name: Button
description: Primary action trigger with retro lift effect. Supports button and link behaviors with customizable variants and sizes.

variant.description: Visual variant determining colors and hover states

size.description: Size preset controlling height, padding, and text size

fullWidth.description: Expand button to fill container width

iconOnly.description: Square button with icon only (no text)

loading.description: Show loading spinner (only applies to buttons with icons)

href.description: URL for navigation. When provided, button can act as a link

asLink.description: When href is provided: true renders as Next.js Link, false uses window.open

children.description: Button label text (optional when iconOnly is true)
